plugins.name: kit
plugins.description: 20 specialist subagents, 42 skills, and 17 slash commands. Approval-first dispatch with LIGHT/MEDIUM/HEAVY tiers, live /hub:help discovery, opt-in usage tracking, and project-scoped instincts. Adapted from vudovn/antigravity-kit with Python/FastAPI/SQLAlchemy and LLM observability additions.
